title: Xaero's Minimap Icons for Untitled Duck Mod
description: Adds icons for Untitled Duck Mod for Xaero's Minimap
body:
![Project Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f626dcfe8e8a03bba950f7928ee98f1814168a45.png) # Xaero Icons for Untitled Goose Mod Adds icons for [Untitled Duck Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/untitled-duck-mod) for [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap). It supports all of the goose and duck variants, even the super-secret ones 👀. For any issues, use the [GitHub issue tracker](https://github.com/adriancalavie/XaeroIconsForUntitledGooseMod/issues). ## In-Game Look


In-game preview
